# Inferred requirements for the supernova project
# This file was generated by scanning the repository for third-party imports.
# It does NOT replace the existing requirements.txt; it's an additional,
# best-effort list of packages that the project appears to need.
#
# Notes:
# - Some packages are optional or platform/GPU-specific (torch, onnxruntime,
#   ctranslate2). Install the variants you need (e.g. torch with CUDA).
# - Some import names may not match PyPI package names exactly. If pip
#   cannot find a package when installing, try the likely PyPI name shown in
#   the comment beside that entry.

# Core / used widely in code
requests
numpy
PyYAML

# Async / web
aiohttp
gradio

# Audio / voice
#pyaudio    # PyPI: PyAudio (may need system deps: portaudio)
#simpleaudio
resampy

# ML / models
torch       # pick CPU or GPU build as appropriate (e.g. torch or torch==...+cpu)
onnxruntime
ctranslate2
tokenizers

# Scraping / search
beautifulsoup4  # provides bs4
ddgs            # (DuckDuckGo search helper; if unavailable try duckduckgo-search)

# Optional / integrations
homeassistant_api  # optional, only used if Home Assistant integration enabled
ollama             # optional, loaded dynamically in code
piper-tts              # optional TTS integration (may not be on PyPI under this name)
faster-whisper

# If you prefer pinned versions, adapt the lines above after a successful
# test/installation in your environment. To install:
#   pip install -r requirements.inferred.txt
